chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْوُقُوفِ عَلَى الصَّفَا وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 141 – The pausing upon Al Safa and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/68)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/68)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ بَابِ الصَّفَا قُلْتُ إِنَّ أَصْحَابَنَا قَدِ اخْتَلَفُوا فِيهِ بَعْضُهُمْ يَقُولُ الَّذِي يَلِي السِّقَايَةَ وَ بَعْضُهُمْ يَقُولُ الَّذِي يَلِي الْحَجَرَ فَقَالَ هُوَ الَّذِي يَلِي السِّقَايَةَ مُحْدَثٌ صَنَعَهُ دَاوُدُ وَ فَتَحَهُ دَاوُدُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Abdul Hameed Bin Saeed who said,

‘I asked Abu Ibrahim<sup>as</sup> about the door of Al-Safa. I said, ‘Our companions have differed with regards to it. Some of them are saying, ‘(It is that) which is next to the watering place (Zamzam)’, and some of them are saying, ‘(It is that) which is next to the (Black) Stone’.’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is which is next to the watering place (Zamzam). It was newly made by Dawood, and Dawood opened it’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from Safwan ibn Yahya from ‘Servants (of Allah) al-Hamid ibn Sa‘id who has said the following: “I asked abu Ibrahim, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the door of al-Safa’ saying, ‘Our people have differences about it. Certain ones among them say, “It is in front of the water fountain and others say that it is in front of the Black Stone.’” He (the Imam) said, ‘It is the one which is in front of the water fountain. Dawud initiated it and Dawud was the one who opened it.’”
